style="margin:0px;margin-left:4px;">+ from(String in): TNumber</p><p style="margin:0px;margin-left:4px;">+ from(BigInteger in): TNumber</p><p style="margin:0px;margin-left:4px;">+ from(BigDecimal in): TNumber</p><p style="margin:0px;margin-left:4px;">+ from(double in): TNumber</p><p style="margin:0px;margin-left:4px;">+ from(float in): TNumber</p><p style="margin:0px;margin-left:4px;">+ from(int
